rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - “Handala Hack” – Unveiling Group’s Modus Operandi
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/29
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*handala.bat*'
            - '*handala.rar*'
            - '*i.gif*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
